title: SiapbOSku
description: 32-bit operating system with separation between kernel and user land. It uses a custom EXT2 filesystem, with multitasking capabilities, and a fully working shell

title: ASM HTTP Server
description: HTTP server written entirely in x86 assembly. The server can handle multiple connectiens simultaneously using a forking model for each client request. It also serves various filetypes

title: Mandelbrot Generator
description: Mandelbrot set generator that uses CPU and GPU parallelization to achieve high speed generation

title: Bitwise Multiplication Calculator
description: Multiplication calculator that is written entirely using bitwise operators. Can handle numbers up to 10^1.000.000 in a reasonable time

title: CTF Challenge Repository
description: Collection of CTF challenges i authored for personal learning as well as various events

title: Vigenere Cipher Cracker
description: Cracker for vigenere cipher that utilizes Dynamic Programming for Index of Coincidence calculation to efficiently solve a vigenere key written in Python

title: TCP over UDP Chat Application
description: Python chat app with client and server application to demonstrate an implementation of TCP over UDP

title: Rush Hour Puzzle Solver
description: Java desktop application of solver for Rush Hour Puzzle. Uses various pathfinding algorithms to efficiently find a solution for the puzzle

title: Little Alchemy Recipe Finder
description: Website that allows searching for recipes of items in Little Alchemy 2

title: SongSmart
description: Website that lets you find a song's name by it's tune and albums by their cover art
